title: AlphaFold 3 screen
steps: Protein sequences were downloaded from the Uniprot server.
We accessed AlphaFold 3 from its virtual server ( https://alphafoldserver.com) to run pairwise predictions with 5 models per prediction.
Predictions with an ipTM score of > 0.5 were considered putative hits and diagnostic plots (PAE plot and pLDDT plot) as well as the generated structures were manually inspected.
Predicted structures were visualized with ChimeraX-1.8.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
